summary.health_note: High zombie ratio (~51%) driven by main branch code freeze since April 3, 2026. Active closure rate is healthy (189 in 30d / ~6.3/day).

health_distribution.estimation_method: Sample-based: 2 pages (100 newest + 100 oldest) from 737 total open issues

label_health.triage_note: 14% of recent issues lack labels — triaging team should review unlabeled issues #14256, #14250, #13897, #14215, #14233

bug_analysis.p1_urgent_note: No explicit P1 label used. 'BUG' + 'needs-repro' are key triage labels. Consider adding P1/P2/P3 priority labels.

recommendations: Apply 'Blocked: v2' label to feature requests blocked by code freeze so reporters understand timeline
Triage 14% unlabeled recent issues (14/100 in sample)
Introduce P1/P2/P3 priority labels for better severity tracking
Consider bulk-closing Zombie issues (90+ days, no activity) with a comment pointing to v2 timeline
The 'inactive' label (41 in sample) suggests auto-close bot is active — verify threshold settings
